# Adil Bhatti

> Official site of author Adil Bhatti, American-Pakistani writer based in the United States. Published under Alpha Leonis Production Studio LLC. Catalog spans young adult sci-fi fantasy, investigative UFO and UAP non-fiction, and a series of ten Islamic notebooks. Tagline: Stories that cross continents, cultures, and dimensions.

## Author

Adil Bhatti is an American-Pakistani author based in the United States. He is the founder of Alpha Leonis Production Studio LLC, under which all his work is independently published. Social: Instagram and Threads @6MillionRupeeMan. Amazon author page: https://www.amazon.com/stores/author/B0FHL19MKV.

## Books

### Omar & Ali: The Key to Orulenthia

- URL: https://adilbhatti.com/books/omar-ali-key-to-orulenthia/
- Genre: Young adult sci-fi fantasy, portal fantasy, action-adventure
- Length: 243 pages
- ISBN: 9798218721107
- Published: June 28, 2025
- Formats: Paperback (Amazon ASIN B0FG6N4W3F), Hardcover (B0FK1YH7FV), Kindle (B0FG5Q5519)
- Summary: Two Moroccan-American teen brothers from New Jersey, Omar and Ali, find a triangular alien device in a Tangier antiques shop. Back home, they accidentally activate it and a portal opens, pulling them to Orulenthia, a giant alien planet of billions ruled by the sadistic tyrant Lord Thaarn. Lord Thaarn's spies hunt a rebellion of alien rebels who dare to speak up against him, including the warrior-scholar Vaan, the fierce warrior Nysha, and Vaan's close friend Ytelthuun. Omar and Ali are swept into the fight. Travel on the planet includes hovering telepathic vehicles that skim above the ground, giant gliders using non-human propulsion to launch into the sky, and winged sentient beasts resembling giant stingrays. One of the rare young adult sci-fi adventures with Muslim heroes at the center.
- Comps: Percy Jackson, Stargate, A Wrinkle in Time, Star Trek, Dune, Ender's Game, Star Wars
- Available at: Amazon, Barnes & Noble, Walmart, AbeBooks, eBay, Fishpond, MainStreet Bookends, and via IngramSpark to libraries and independent bookstores

### Ancient Aliens to Modern UFOs: The Disclosure Revolution

- URL: https://adilbhatti.com/books/ancient-aliens-to-modern-ufos/
- Genre: Non-fiction, UFO research, UAP investigation, ancient astronaut theory, investigative journalism
- ISBN: 9798218888015
- Published: December 19, 2025
- Formats: Paperback (Amazon ASIN B0G9CBSZB4), Hardcover (B0GBVTMPLQ), Kindle (B0G92G451W)
- Summary: A meticulously researched non-fiction investigation bridging ancient astronaut evidence and modern UAP disclosure into a single continuous narrative. The book opens with the civilizational implications of disclosure, including how confirmed non-human propulsion technology could reshape the global energy economy, challenge the petroleum-based capitalist framework, and force reconsideration of foundational religious and societal assumptions. It covers Sumerian Anunnaki tablets, Egyptian monuments aligned with the stars, Amarna-period sculptures from the reign of Akhenaten, Ezekiel's wheels within wheels, Hindu scripture and Quran references to celestial beings and advanced vehicles, the Nazca Lines, the 1561 Nuremberg celestial event, the 1896 Great Airship Mystery, the 1942 Battle of Los Angeles (1,400+ anti-aircraft shells fired), Roswell, Rendlesham Forest, the Phoenix Lights, the USS Nimitz Tic Tac encounter with Commander David Fravor, USS Roosevelt UAP incidents, Luis Elizondo's exposure of AATIP, Tom DeLonge and To The Stars Academy, Pentagon-officially-confirmed Navy UAP footage, and the 2023 Congressional hearings with sworn testimony from Ryan Graves, David Grusch, and Commander David Fravor, including Grusch's testimony about recovered non-human craft entered into the Congressional record.
- Comps: Leslie Kean, Jacques Vallée, Erich von Däniken, Graham Hancock
- Available at: Amazon, Google Books, Strand Book Store, Powell's Books, Goodreads, Booktopia, AbeBooks, and via IngramSpark

## Notebooks

Ten Islamic notebooks, all 200-page college-ruled, 6.24 x 9.24 inches, with Bismillah calligraphy on every page. Independently published under Alpha Leonis Production Studio LLC and available on Amazon.

Hijabi-themed series:
- Hijabi 'til I Die
- Hijabi Queen
- Hijabi Gang Where My Girls At
- Hijabi and Chill
- Hijabi and Unbreakable

Men's series:
- Pray Du'a Shawarma Repeat
- That Shawarma Life
- It's Shawarma Time Ya Salaam
- Halal Hustler
- Salah Shawarma Success

## Publisher

Alpha Leonis Production Studio LLC is the independent imprint of author Adil Bhatti, through which all his books and notebooks are published.
